---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one- or two-sentence description of the feature you want.

## Motivation

Why do you need this? What problem does it solve, or what workflow does it enable?

## Which Component Does This Affect?

- [ ] MCP Tool (new deterministic tool in `mcp_server/`)
- [ ] Expert Template (new specialist in `docs/experts/`)
- [ ] Admin UI
- [ ] Orchestrator / routing logic (`main.py`)
- [ ] GraphRAG / knowledge graph
- [ ] Kafka / event streaming
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Installer / deployment
- [ ] Other: ___

## Proposed Implementation (optional)

If you have a concrete idea of how this should be built, describe it here.
Reference the relevant extension points from `CONTRIBUTING.md` if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add mockups, example API calls, links to related issues, or any other context.
